iterations.theme: The Reality of Christ's Resurrection: Overcoming Deepest Human Problems and Worldly Illusions
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript constitutes a single sermon/talk that flows continuously without a major thematic shift that would warrant a split into multiple iterations. Its total duration is also less than the minimum requested iteration length (35-45 minutes).
